metadata.description: Not Rest Inc.'s Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: oracle-suite
plugins.description: Working-session toolkit with a live cross-session handoff line: ORACLE intake (resumes + interrogates the predecessor session) -> researcher / marketresearcher / stepbystep / actionplan / critic, a director that chains them, and a self-recording sessionend handoff. fable-mode bolts a verification-first working discipline into every session via the SessionStart hook. fable-director seats and rotates the '3 devs and a relay' multi-session dev arrangement (a metered director + flat lanes over per-lane blackboard files with token-watch wakes). Automated continuity hooks + shared CLAUDE.md foundation keep sessions continuous.
